**Subject Line:**  
⚠️ Verify Your Account Details to Prevent Unauthorized Access

---

**Body:**

Dear Valued Customer,

We are writing to ensure the security of your account with [Bank Name]. To protect your personal information and prevent unauthorized access, we kindly ask you to verify your account details by clicking on the link below:

[**Verify Account Details**](https://www.bankname.com/verify-account)

This verification is required to maintain the security of your account and to ensure that all transactions are authorized by you.

Please note that this request is part of our routine security checks and is not related to any suspicious activity on your account. If you did not request this verification, please contact our customer support team immediately at [support@bankname.com](mailto:support@bankname.com) or call us at [1-800-XXX-XXXX].

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter and thank you for being a valued customer of [Bank Name].

Best regards,  
[Bank Name] Customer Support Team  
[Bank Logo or Official Seal]  
[Bank Website URL]

---

**Important Security Tips:**
- **Never click on suspicious links** in emails. Instead, type the bank’s
